title: pinus rigida subsp. typica
intro: Pinus rigida subsp. typica, also known as the stiff pine or pitch pine, is a subspecies of pine tree that is native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pinus rigida subsp. typica include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of Pinus rigida subsp. typica include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including bronchitis and pneumonia.
